sections.paragraph:
Original: חדל

Transliteration: châdal

Phonetic: khaw-dal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to stop, cease, desist, forego, cease to be, leave undone, forbear
    1. (Qal)
      1. to cease, come to an end
      2. to cease, leave off

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 609

Part(s) of speech: Verb
